parent.name: Svend II ULFSSON ESTRIDSSEN KING OF DENMARK

zh.lifeSummary: 當Nils Svendsøn of Danmark於1064年出生時，他的父親Svend II ULFSSON ESTRIDSSEN KING OF DENMARK46歲，母親Gunhild Svensdotter45歲。他和Margareta Fredkulla Ingesdotter至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nils Svendsøn of Danmark于1064年出生时，他的父亲Svend II ULFSSON ESTRIDSSEN KING OF DENMARK46岁，母亲Gunhild Svensdotter45岁。他和Margareta Fredkulla Ingesdotter至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Svendsøn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Bjorn, Erik, Knut, Lars, Niels, Per, Thor, Astrid, Britt, Carsten, Einer, Evald.
Danish and Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name Svend, from Old Norse Sveinn, originally a byname meaning ‘boy, servant’. Compare Svenson , Swanson , Swendsen , Swensen , and Swenson .

variants.name: Svenson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Sven, Erik, Bjorn, Dagny.  German Kurt, Gerhard, Irmgard.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Svensson  . This surname is also found in Denmark, northern Germany, and Norway.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish   Svensen   or   Svendsen  , cognates of 1.

variants.name: Svenningsen
meanings: Danish and Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name Svenning, a variant of Sveinung, from Old Norse Sveinn (see Svendsen ) + the suffix -ung ‘son of’.

variants.name: Swendsen
meanings: Americanized form of Danish and Norwegian   Svendsen  . Compare   Swensen  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Danmark
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): ethnic name denoting someone from Denmark (see   Dence  ). In the British Isles this name is found mainly in East Anglia.
Americanized form of German Dennemark, ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle Low German Dennemarken.

variants.name: Dence
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Herta.

English (Kent): variant of Dench, an ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle English denshe, dench ‘Danish’ (Old English denisc). There were many Danes in England in the Middle Ages, not only the long-established settlers in the Danelaw region, but also more recent immigrants.

nameMeanings.name: Nils
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

en.lifeSummary: When Nils Svendsøn of Danmark was born in 1064, his father, Svend II ULFSSON ESTRIDSSEN KING OF DENMARK, was 46 and his mother, Gunhild Svensdotter, was 45. He had at least 1 daughter with Margareta Fredkulla Ingesdotter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nils Svendsøn of Danmark est né en 1064, son père, Svend II ULFSSON ESTRIDSSEN KING OF DENMARK, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Gunhild Svensdotter, avait 45 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Margareta Fredkulla Ingesdotter.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nils Svendsøn of Danmark 1064 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Svend II ULFSSON ESTRIDSSEN KING OF DENMARK 46 und seine Mutter Gunhild Svensdotter 45. Er hatte mit Margareta Fredkulla Ingesdotter mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nils Svendsøn of Danmark è nato il nel 1064, il suo padre, Svend II ULFSSON ESTRIDSSEN KING OF DENMARK, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Gunhild Svensdotter, aveva 45 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Margareta Fredkulla Ingesdotter.

ja.lifeSummary: Nils Svendsøn of Danmarkが1064年に生まれた時，父Svend II ULFSSON ESTRIDSSEN KING OF DENMARKは46歳，母Gunhild Svensdotterは45歳であった。彼はMargareta Fredkulla Ingesdotterとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Nils Svendsøn of Danmark(이)가 1064년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Svend II ULFSSON ESTRIDSSEN KING OF DENMARK(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Gunhild Svensdotter(은)는 45세였다. 그는 Margareta Fredkulla Ingesdotter(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nils Svendsøn of Danmark nasceu em 1064, seu pai, Svend II ULFSSON ESTRIDSSEN KING OF DENMARK, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Gunhild Svensdotter, tinha 45 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Margareta Fredkulla Ingesdotter.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nils Svendsøn of Danmark родился в 1064 г., его отцу по имени Svend II ULFSSON ESTRIDSSEN KING OF DENMARK было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Gunhild Svensdotter, 45. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Margareta Fredkulla Ingesdotter.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nils Svendsøn of Danmark nació en 1064, su papá, Svend II ULFSSON ESTRIDSSEN KING OF DENMARK, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Gunhild Svensdotter, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Margareta Fredkulla Ingesdotter.
